seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening establishes roll scale: each cooked roll is 10-12 cm long and 3-4 cm diameter, rice freckles outside, rainbow filling inside. Kitchen remains light terrazzo island with Licorn identity.
seedanceSegments.risk: Starting with final food could feel disconnected unless scene 02 immediately explains the inside-out geometry. Avoid mouth close-up and avoid final-dish slicing as the first action.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: sharp rice-paper crackle, thick peanut sauce dip, single glossy drip, soft plate set-down
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide only as structural Licorn kitchen context, not as a camera framing requirement. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only as shot-specific island hero view and terrazzo surface. Use @CharacterSheet only as Licorn character identity for hands and final context. Use @PoseThreeQuarterRight only as three-quarter right hand/body pose for plate placement. Use @Spoon only as spoon shape for sauce lift only. Kitchen continuity lock: keep the light terrazzo countertop, black flush induction design when visible, cabinet layout, and Licorn kitchen materials consistent; do not redesign the countertop or stovetop. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels asmr_food style, sensual food-porn macro lighting, appetite-first texture, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only close-up kitchen ASMR synchronized with the cuts and food actions. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.1s crackly roll dips; 1.1-2.1s diagonal half reveal; 2.1-3.3s sauce ribbon; 3.3-5.0s Licorn hands plate rolls. Scale lock: cooked rolls remain small hand rolls about 10-12 cm long and 3-4 cm diameter, made from a 12-roll batch; not oversized, not burrito-sized, not miniature. Food physics lock: rice paper should be glossy, taut, then blistered and crackly after shallow skillet frying; vegetables stay cool, colorful and crisp; peanut-lime sauce stays smooth glossy tan and spoon-coating. Utensil/hands lock: show plausible Licorn hands for human actions; use listed utensils only for their stated roles; hot handling is tool-first, no cloth fused with hands. Global negatives: no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no extra shots, no invented countertop, no flames, no deep-fry oil bath, no burrito-sized roll, no miniature cigar rolls, no mouth close-up, no muddy filling colors.
